cards.title: Google DeepMind and A24 Form Multi-Project R&D Partnership with Google Investment
cards.why_it_matters: A leading AI lab embedding researchers directly inside a major film studio's creative workflow is a novel real-world testbed for generative media tools — worth watching for how creative feedback loops shape future model development.
cards.summary: Google DeepMind and A24 are launching a research collaboration spanning multiple projects, embedding DeepMind's innovations directly into A24's filmmaking process. Filmmakers will provide feedback to shape tool development, while Google is also making a financial investment in A24. Specific technical outputs and milestones are not yet defined.
